allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Personal\\AI Experimenting\\daily-planner"; $null = python dashboard.py 2>&1 | Out-Null; python dashboard.py 2>$null | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "dashboard_test_out.json"; python -m json.tool "dashboard_test_out.json" | Select-String "week_range|start|end|avg_perf|top_habit|deep_work_days|sample_size"; Write-Host "---history entries:"; \(Get-Content dashboard_history.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).Count)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Personal\\AI Experimenting\\daily-planner"; python dashboard.py 2>run.log >dashboard_out.json; $rc=$LASTEXITCODE; Get-Content run.log | Select-Object -Last 8; Write-Host "---"; Write-Host "Exit code: $rc")

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Personal\\AI Experimenting\\daily-planner"; $d = Get-Content dashboard_out.json | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "=== JOURNAL LINES ==="; $d.journal_lines | ForEach-Object { if \($_.do_differently -or \($_.journal -and $_.journal -ne "These notes carry forward to tomorrow's page."\)\) { Write-Host "Date: $\($_.date\)"; if \($_.do_differently\) { Write-Host "  One thing differently: $\($_.do_differently\)" }; if \($_.journal -and $_.journal -ne "These notes carry forward to tomorrow's page."\) { Write-Host "  Reflection: $\($_.journal\)" }; Write-Host "" } }; Write-Host "=== INSIGHTS \(check for em-dashes\) ==="; Write-Host "Affirmation: $\($d.insights.affirmation\)"; Write-Host "Forward: $\($d.insights.forward_note\)"; Write-Host "Slipping: $\($d.insights.slipping_note\)")
PowerShell(python -c "import notion_client; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(notion_client\); lines = src.split\('\\n'\)[:50]; print\('\\n'.join\(lines\)\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(python -c "import httpx; print\('httpx available'\); import notion_client.client as nc; import inspect; src=inspect.getsource\(nc\); print\([l for l in src.split\('\\n'\) if 'httpx' in l or 'requests' in l][:10]\)" 2>&1)
